title: load_identity passphrase String never zeroized
description: In keyfile.rs load_identity, rpassword::prompt_password returns a plain String. The local binding 'passphrase' and the intermediate .to_owned() copy inside Secret::new() are not zeroized on drop. age::secrecy::Secret does zeroize its internal copy, but the original 'passphrase: String' in load_identity lives until function return with its contents in heap memory unprotected. Fix: wrap the passphrase in a Zeroizing<String> before use, or use a crate that returns a zeroizing type directly.
